Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class EstateEnrollmentMetadata

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.EstateEnrollmentMetadata
public class EstateEnrollmentMetadata extends Object
EstateEnrollmentMetadata

Metadata for the REGISTRATION_ESTATE enrollment type
